meta.title: Ferhat Çubukçu — Painter
meta.description: Contemporary oil painting from İstanbul — Fibonacci, golden ratio, and exhibition work. See Behance for the full portfolio.

home.statementLead: Spirals drawn from Fibonacci’s approach to the golden ratio, woven through figures and compositions — oil on canvas, often at 80×100 cm and beyond.
home.featuredSubtitle: Browse the full gallery for every published piece.
home.heroAlt: Ferhat Çubukçu — oil painting, İstanbul studio
home.newsTeaserSubtitle: Exhibitions, social posts, and updates from the studio.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.seoDescription: Gallery of oil paintings by Ferhat Çubukçu — İstanbul artist working with Fibonacci, golden ratio, and figurative composition.
gallery.empty: Works will appear here once you add them in the admin panel.

news.title: News & updates
news.intro: Exhibitions, press, social posts, and notes from the studio.
news.seoDescription: News, exhibitions, and studio updates from painter Ferhat Çubukçu — İstanbul.

about.title: About
about.seoDescription: Biography and studio practice — oil on canvas, Fibonacci and golden ratio in composition, exhibitions in Türkiye.

contact.title: Contact
contact.seoDescription: Contact Ferhat Çubukçu for commissions, exhibitions, and studio visits — İstanbul painter. Portfolio on Behance.
contact.reachOut: For commissions, exhibitions, or studio visits, please write. More work and CV context live on Behance.
contact.trustShipping: Shipping, VAT, and customs depend on destination and current regulations — details are confirmed in writing before any sale.
contact.trustOrdering: Availability and pricing on this site are for reference; a short email thread usually clarifies framing, delivery, and payment.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.intro: Recent posts from the studio Instagram. Tap any image to open it on Instagram.
instagram.seoDescription: Instagram feed — studio posts, process, and exhibitions from painter Ferhat Çubukçu in İstanbul.
instagram.emptyPosts: No posts were returned for this account yet.
instagram.configureP1: To show every post here, this site uses Meta’s Instagram Graph API. The account must be a professional Instagram profile (Business or Creator) linked to a Facebook Page — personal accounts cannot be queried by the API.
instagram.configureP2: Create a long-lived access token in the Meta developer tools, then set INSTAGRAM_USER_ID (the Instagram business account ID) and INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN on the server (for example in Vercel environment variables). Redeploy after saving.
instagram.configureP3: See .env.example in the repository for variable names. Until then, use the button above to visit the profile on Instagram.
instagram.loadErrorHint: The token may have expired or lost permissions. Generate a new long-lived token in Meta for Developers and update INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN, then redeploy.

footer.rights: © Ferhat Çubukçu. All works reserved unless noted.

admin.newsIntro: Bilingual posts with optional image and external link (Instagram, Behance, press).
admin.detailImagesHint: Optional close-ups, frame, or texture. Select multiple files; up to 24 per painting.
admin.exhibitionHint: Optional — e.g. group show title and city.
admin.soldHint: Sold works remain in the public gallery with a SOLD label on the image.
admin.priceHint: Optional. Free text — e.g. €4,500, TL equivalent, or “On request”. Shown on gallery and painting pages; leave blank to hide.
